microdomains.name: material_identity
microdomains.owns: Material naming, SKU, manufacturer origin, product variant

microdomains.name: material_properties
microdomains.owns: R-values, perm ratings, tensile strength, elongation, fire rating, thickness, reflectivity

microdomains.name: material_relationships
microdomains.owns: Compatibility matrices, adjacency rules, chemical interaction profiles

microdomains.name: material_composition
microdomains.owns: Layer stacks, reinforcement types, surface treatments, base chemistry

microdomains.name: material_constraints
microdomains.owns: Application constraints, temperature limits, code references

microdomains.name: material_context
microdomains.owns: Failure modes, degradation profiles, condition-specific behavior

microdomains.name: material_lineage
microdomains.owns: Spec sheet provenance, version chains, manufacturer revision history

no_overlap_assertion: This kernel does not claim chemical interaction truth (Chemistry Kernel), assembly sequence truth (Assembly Kernel), specification requirement truth (Specification Kernel), boundary/scope truth (Scope Kernel), or navigation hierarchy truth (Taxonomy Kernel).
lineage_policy: All material DNA objects must maintain version provenance. Spec sheet origin and manufacturer revision chain are mandatory fields.
projection_policy: Material DNA objects may be projected into taxonomy navigation, atlas spatial context, and application UI surfaces. Projections are derived and read-only.
